overrides.override_summary: Filing not endorsement; 7-day pre-sale disclosure required
overrides.why_it_matters: Hawaii franchisees get 7 days to review vs. 14 days federally

overrides.override_summary: No waiver of claims under state franchise law or fraud in inducement
overrides.why_it_matters: Questionnaires cannot waive your rights

overrides.override_summary: Illinois law governs the franchise agreement
overrides.why_it_matters: Overrides Minnesota choice of law

overrides.override_summary: Venue outside Illinois is void (arbitration outside IL permitted)
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be forced to litigate in Minnesota

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee rights on termination/non-renewal per IL Franchise Disclosure Act Sections 19-20
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional procedural protections on exit

overrides.override_summary: Waiver of IL Franchise Disclosure Act compliance is void
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisor cannot require you to waive statutory protections

overrides.override_summary: Post-termination noncompete limited to reasonable distance
overrides.why_it_matters: 10-mile radius may be challenged; 'reasonable' standard applies

overrides.override_summary: Litigation must be conducted in Indiana or mutually agreed site
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be forced to litigate in Minnesota

overrides.override_summary: Marketing area assessment >2% of Gross Revenues may be unenforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: The 4% local advertising requirement may face challenge

overrides.override_summary: Release at renewal/transfer does not apply to MD franchise law liability
overrides.why_it_matters: You retain right to sue under MD law even after signing release

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may sue in Maryland for MD franchise law claims; 3-year limitation
overrides.why_it_matters: Can litigate locally for state law claims

overrides.override_summary: Bankruptcy termination may be unenforceable under federal law
overrides.why_it_matters: Filing for bankruptcy may not automatically terminate franchise

overrides.override_summary: All initial fees deferred until franchisor completes pre-opening obligations; area development fees deferred until first franchise opens
overrides.why_it_matters: You don't pay until franchisor delivers; protects against collecting fees without performing

overrides.override_summary: Good cause required for termination; 30-day cure opportunity
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be terminated for minor or pretextual reasons

overrides.override_summary: Fair compensation required on non-renewal (if term <5 years and restricted from similar business)
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisor must repurchase inventory/equipment at fair market value

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration outside Michigan precluded (except by post-agreement consent)
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be forced to arbitrate in Minnesota

overrides.override_summary: Cannot prohibit franchisee from joining association of franchisees
overrides.why_it_matters: Right to organize with other franchisees is protected

overrides.override_summary: All initial franchise fees and development fees deferred until business opens
overrides.why_it_matters: Significant protection — you don't pay until you're operating

overrides.override_summary: 90 days termination notice (60 days to cure); 180 days non-renewal notice
overrides.why_it_matters: More time to cure defaults and prepare for non-renewal than base agreement

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages, termination penalties, and judgment notes prohibited
overrides.why_it_matters: The 60-month liquidated damages clause is void in Minnesota

overrides.override_summary: General release prohibited
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be required to sign away claims at renewal or transfer

overrides.override_summary: Jury trial waiver prohibited
overrides.why_it_matters: Right to jury trial preserved

overrides.override_summary: NSF fee capped at $30 per MN Statute 604.113
overrides.why_it_matters: The $100 NSF charge is reduced to $30

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may terminate on any grounds available by law
overrides.why_it_matters: Not limited to franchisor's material breach

overrides.override_summary: Renewal/transfer releases subject to NY GBL Article 33 protections
overrides.why_it_matters: Statutory rights cannot be released

overrides.override_summary: Choice of law subject to NY GBL Article 33
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchise law may override Minnesota choice of law

overrides.override_summary: Noncompete covenants generally unenforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: Post-term 2-year noncompete is void in North Dakota

overrides.override_summary: Mediation/litigation at location agreeable to parties; consent to out-of-state jurisdiction deleted
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be forced to Minnesota

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages and termination penalties prohibited
overrides.why_it_matters: 60-month liquidated damages clause void

overrides.override_summary: Jury trial waiver and exemplary/punitive damages waiver deleted
overrides.why_it_matters: Full range of damages available

overrides.override_summary: General release on renewal deleted
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be required to release claims at re-franchise

overrides.override_summary: North Dakota law governs franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: ND law applies, not Minnesota

overrides.override_summary: Venue restriction outside RI void for RI Act claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Can litigate in Rhode Island

overrides.override_summary: No cancellation without reasonable cause per VA Retail Franchising Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional protection against arbitrary termination

overrides.override_summary: WA Franchise Investment Protection Act prevails in conflicts
overrides.why_it_matters: WA law trumps franchise agreement provisions

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration/mediation/litigation may be in Washington
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be forced to Minnesota

overrides.override_summary: Release void except negotiated post-agreement with independent counsel
overrides.why_it_matters: Standard renewal/transfer releases are void

overrides.override_summary: Statute of limitations restrictions and jury trial waivers may be unenforceable; punitive damages waivers void
overrides.why_it_matters: Full range of damages and time to bring claims preserved

overrides.override_summary: Employee noncompete void below $100K earnings; IC below $250K; no-poach/no-solicitation void
overrides.why_it_matters: Most franchisee employees likely below threshold — effectively no employee noncompete

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may terminate under any state law grounds; repurchase without consent prohibited during term
overrides.why_it_matters: Broader termination rights; protected from forced buyback

overrides.override_summary: Transfer fees limited to reasonable estimated/actual costs; products must be fair and reasonable price
overrides.why_it_matters: $7,500 transfer fee may be challenged if exceeds actual costs

overrides.override_summary: No obligation to indemnify franchisor for its negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be forced to cover franchisor's own wrongdoing
